data.name: Shinjuku Hearts
data.detailed_description:
An adult visual novel set in the bustling city of modern Shinjuku, Japan.

Follow the misadventures of a spirited, young local man named Guy as he pursues the hearts of various girls.
See their erotic and tender moments with an immersive soundscape to put you into the scene.

- Discover a quirky, lovable cast of characters
- Hand drawn, detailed uncensored scenes
- Branching story lines with multiple endings
- Full English text
- No unlock or level requirements to access erotic scenes
- No unnecessary, time wasting game mechanics
- No micro-transactions, paywalls or censor patches
data.about_the_game:
An adult visual novel set in the bustling city of modern Shinjuku, Japan.

Follow the misadventures of a spirited, young local man named Guy as he pursues the hearts of various girls.
See their erotic and tender moments with an immersive soundscape to put you into the scene.

- Discover a quirky, lovable cast of characters
- Hand drawn, detailed uncensored scenes
- Branching story lines with multiple endings
- Full English text
- No unlock or level requirements to access erotic scenes
- No unnecessary, time wasting game mechanics
- No micro-transactions, paywalls or censor patches
data.short_description: Skateboard into the bustling city of Shinjuku in this beautiful, hand drawn, adult visual novel. Follow the misadventures of Guy as he humorously pursues the affection of sexy ladies and discovers their heartfelt stories. Which girl will you choose?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i series, AMD Ryzen series
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 series, AMD Ryzen3 1500 series
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1920x1080
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
